original: This tight, short-sleeved shirt is made with thick bands of heavy-duty elastic instead of ultralastic, and for a specific reason: it's designed to squeeze the wearer's flabby, undisciplined flesh down into a svelte sex-bomb shape. It's very uncomfortable to wear, but looking good is all about making sacrifices, right?\n\nA JoyCo-brand product.
